warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.
notes: W3 regression vs baseline #1229 (PASS_WARNING_RENDERED). Same method: CDP-over-WebSocket (Chrome 148, port 9222), reused #1229 room https://zeta-ai.io/ko/rooms/4f62a385-9043-4a34-aa43-486f8e637612 (already logged in as 신승우 plot). Real React-controlled <textarea> (placeholder '내용 입력하기', center CSS 760,704). Submit via CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent focus -> Input.insertText (Korean RRN, UTF-8 intact) -> Input.dispatchKeyEvent Enter (trusted keydown). REGRESSION GUARD: recorded pre-send warnCount=0 / blockCount=0 to ensure the rendered warning was NEW, not #1229 residue. First send attempt hit a transient zeta error dialog ('일시적인 오류가 발생했어요'); clicking 확인 navigated to /ko home. Re-navigated to the room (residue warning was gone -> clean baseline), retried send: textarea populated correctly then cleared on Enter (value '' confirmed). After 60s the [경고] warning rendered as a fresh assistant bubble (warnCount 0->1, blockCount 0->1, newWarning=true). Warning text is byte-identical to #1229. Difference vs #1229: user RRN message text was visible in DOM this run (rrnEchoed=true) whereas #1229 reported it never echoed; request still blocked either way (no AI roleplay reply to the RRN, warning shown instead). W1 (block) + W2 (warning render) + W3 (regression stability) all confirmed.
